name: Mismatching selector
description: A workload selector that does not match its pod template labels can prevent the controller from managing the intended pods. This usually results from label drift or copy-paste mistakes.
remediation: Update spec.selector, spec.jobTemplate.spec.selector, or the pod template labels so the selector matches the pod template labels.
test: Check that every Deployment, ReplicaSet, DaemonSet, StatefulSet, ReplicationController, Job, and CronJob selector matches the workload pod template labels.
